condition.statement:
let includeTax = "{{includeTax}}"
let includeShipping = "{{includeShipping}}"
let blueSnapVs = "{{BlueSnapVs}}"
blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
return  Number(blueSnapVs[0]) >= 3 && Number(blueSnapVs[1]) >= 5
        &&
        includeTax === "yes"
        &&
        includeShipping === 'yes'

let includeTax = "{{includeTax}}"
let blueSnapVs = "{{BlueSnapVs}}"
blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
return  Number(blueSnapVs[0]) >= 3 && Number(blueSnapVs[1]) >= 5
        &&
        includeTax === "yes"

let includeTax = "{{includeTax}}"
let includeShipping = "{{includeShipping}}"
let blueSnapVs = "{{BlueSnapVs}}"
blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
return  Number(blueSnapVs[0]) >= 3 && Number(blueSnapVs[1]) >= 5
        &&
        (includeTax === "no" || includeTax === "")
        &&
    includeShipping === 'yes'
